home.title: Clawome
home.tagline2: From REST APIs to fully autonomous task execution.
home.fromTask: From task to result in one command
home.agentAuto: The agent autonomously plans, navigates, and delivers.
home.pipelineExample: "Search Hacker News for the latest AI news and summarize the top 3 stories"
home.rawNoisy: Raw HTML is noisy. Clawome compresses it to what matters.
home.compareCaption: 7 nodes instead of 800. Every node gets a stable hierarchical ID.
home.feat1Desc: LLM-powered agent plans subtasks, browses pages, and adapts in real-time.
home.feat2Desc: Strips wrappers, scripts, and noise. Agents see only what matters.
home.feat3Desc: Hierarchical IDs like 3.1.4 — click any element on the first try.
home.feat4Desc: Detects infinite loops, recovers from errors, replans when stuck.
home.feat5Desc: Python scripts auto-activate by URL. Each site gets its own optimizer.
home.feat6Desc: Live progress, step visualization, token usage, and cost tracking.

agent.title: Task Agent
agent.desc: Enter a task description. The AI agent will autonomously browse the web, plan subtasks, execute actions, and deliver results.
agent.placeholder: e.g. Search for NYU MS Electrical Engineering admission requirements
agent.configMissing: Go to Settings > Agent to configure
agent.authError: Check your API Key in Settings > Agent
agent.configError: Check API Base URL in Settings > Agent
agent.modelError: Check Model Name in Settings > Agent
agent.connectionError: Check API Base URL in Settings > Agent
agent.rateLimit: Please wait a moment and try again
agent.browserError: Make sure the backend server is running
agent.taskRunning: Wait for the current task to finish or stop it

viewer.title: Browser Playground
viewer.navigatePlaceholder: Navigate to a page to see content.

settings.title: Settings
settings.confirmReset: Reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.
settings.generalDesc: DOM parsing limits and keyboard/scroll behavior.
settings.agentDesc: LLM provider credentials and agent execution parameters for the /agent page.
settings.timeoutsDesc: Navigation, page load, and interaction timeout values.
settings.scriptsDesc: Pluggable scripts that filter and simplify raw DOM nodes. Each script defines a process() function. Click a tab to configure.
settings.rulesDesc: Platform-level rules override script-level URL_PATTERNS. First match wins. Unmatched URLs use the default compressor.
settings.providerDesc: Select your LLM provider. API Base and model list auto-fill on switch.
settings.selectScript: Select a script to view its configuration.
settings.noPatterns: No scripts have declared URL_PATTERNS yet.
settings.rulesHint: Toggle scripts in the Scripts tab. Edit URL_PATTERNS in the script source code to add custom rules.
settings.rulesFallback: Fallback: URLs not matching any rule use the default compressor.
settings.headlessDesc: Run browser without visible window (takes effect on next browser open). Note: some websites detect headless browsers and may block or return empty pages.
settings.screenRefreshDesc: Interval for refreshing the browser screenshot in Viewer page (minimum 1000)
settings.windowXDesc: Browser window X position (0 = system default). Takes effect on next browser open.
settings.windowYDesc: Browser window Y position. Takes effect on next browser open.
settings.windowWidthDesc: Browser window width. Takes effect on next browser open.
settings.windowHeightDesc: Browser window height. Takes effect on next browser open.
settings.maxNodesDesc: Maximum DOM nodes to parse per page
settings.maxDepthDesc: Maximum tree depth for DOM traversal
settings.truncateDesc: Text longer than this is truncated in lite mode (0 = no truncation)
settings.keepHeadDesc: Number of leading characters kept before the …(X chars omitted) marker
settings.apiKeyDesc: API key for the selected LLM provider
settings.apiBaseDesc: API endpoint URL (auto-filled for most providers)
settings.modelNameDesc: Model name without provider prefix, e.g. qwen3.5-plus, gpt-4o
settings.maxStepsDesc: Maximum action steps before a subtask is force-completed
settings.startUrlDesc: Browser opens this URL at the start of each task
settings.navTimeoutDesc: Timeout for page open / back / forward
settings.loadWaitDesc: Wait for DOM content loaded after action
settings.networkIdleDesc: Wait for network idle after action
settings.inputTimeoutDesc: Timeout for fill / select / check actions
settings.benchIdleDesc: Wait for network idle in benchmark

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.desc: DOM compression performance across different websites. Raw HTML tokens vs. compressed DOM tree tokens — measuring how much we can reduce while retaining page semantics and interactive elements.
benchmark.rawTokensDesc: character count of full page outerHTML ÷ 4
benchmark.compressedDesc: character count of the filtered DOM tree output ÷ 4
benchmark.completenessDesc: percentage of visible-only text lines found in compressed output (hidden / collapsed / aria-hidden content excluded from denominator)
benchmark.webAgentDesc: How well the original page supports autonomous web agent browsing (1–5 ★). This is a property of the page itself, not our algorithm. Scoring dimensions:
benchmark.semanticDesc: use of nav, main, article, form, aria-*
benchmark.interactiveDesc: buttons, links, inputs with clear labels
benchmark.htmlRedundancyDesc: excessive div nesting, inline styles, bloated markup that wastes agent tokens
benchmark.note1: Walker node cap set to 20,000 — sufficient for all tested pages
benchmark.note2: Google Search blocks automated browsers with captcha — rated ★☆☆☆☆
benchmark.note3: Click ▶ to re-run any individual benchmark via the /api/benchmark endpoint
benchmark.note4: Enter any URL in the input box below the table to test a new page
benchmark.apiDesc: Benchmark is available as a standalone REST API:
benchmark.apiReturns: Returns: compression stats, completeness %, token saving %, visible line counts

interactive.navigateFirst: Navigate to a page to see elements.

domChanges.placeholder: Execute a Click or Type action to see results here.
domChanges.noDomChanges: No dom_changes in response (action may not support diff yet)
